name: Counter-Strike: Source
description: Counter-Strike: Source blends Counter-Strike's award-winning teamplay action with the advanced technology of Source™ technology.
requirements:
Minimum: 1.7 GHz Processor, 512MB RAM, DirectX® 8.1 level Graphics Card (Requires support for SSE), Windows® 7 (32/64-bit)/Vista/XP, Mouse, Keyboard, Internet Connection

Recommended: Pentium 4 processor (3.0GHz, or better), 1GB RAM, DirectX® 9 level Graphics Card, Windows® 7 (32/64-bit)/Vista/XP, Mouse, Keyboard, Internet Connection
comment1:
This game still feels better than CS2 most of the times. No cheaters, no unnecesary things. Pure CS experience. 

When you get bored of the cheaters in CS2, come and enjoy a good old CS.
comment2: Bought for GMOD, stayed for an underated game for some casual fun. I would call this a truly "hidden gem".
comment3: Yooo This is the goat of all Counter Strike this version is dope asf many players here are chilling and respectful the fact many players are comedians we play this game all day and all night when were free the ragdolls is awesome, the physics is awesome even the gravity commands, I'm pro at this game but not number 1 I just like its functionality and formula of this game, it's way easier to knife someone other than that ugly Counter Strike 2 game. The achievement pop ups are not annoying but it's like a little fun fact what players achieve the text box after round bloew the screen is helpful to see what other players are doing, this is the Gold game I've ever played and I liked it I gain so many friends playing this game were just chilling you can even install mods to do zombie escape that's the best part 50 player being chased by zombies as we run for our lives, I like it.
